response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed to identify the song. The on-screen text and audio confirm the song is 'We are GAMERS !!!!' by hololive GAMERS. The song metadata was searched using the query '"We are GAMERS !!!!" hololive GAMERS Japanese and English lyrics'. The lyrics were retrieved from the search results. The structure of the video consists of an intro countdown followed by the live performance.
response.global_summary: A performance of the song 'We are GAMERS !!!!' by the hololive GAMERS group (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone) at a live concert. The video features a countdown followed by the group performing with choreography, supported by light stick visuals and arcade-themed background graphics.

scenes.description: Countdown from 7 to 0, followed by the song 'We are GAMERS !!!!' starting with all four members of hololive GAMERS appearing on stage and beginning their performance.
